summary: Iteration 71 - Google Maps Admin Settings + Address Flow Testing. Backend: 19/19 tests passed. Frontend: Admin Google Maps card working correctly with key save, country code checkboxes, and masked display. Address flow on listing details page correctly shows disabled state when no category selected.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminSystemSettings.js: Google Maps card correctly renders with data-testid attributes, country checkboxes from API, and key masked display
ListingDetails.js: Address block correctly uses countryRadioOptions from places/config API, conditional rendering based on addressBlockEnabled works
Backend admin google-maps endpoints: GET returns country_options with code/name, POST validates at least one country_code required
Backend places/config: Correctly returns country_options from admin settings for web address flow

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Admin Google Maps card working, address flow behaves correctly)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Google Maps admin settings fully working. Backend endpoints: GET/POST /api/admin/system-settings/google-maps, GET /api/places/config returns country_options from admin. ListingDetails address flow requires category selection to enable address block - this is expected behavior.

verified_features.admin_google_maps_settings_post: Saves api_key and country_codes, returns country_options
verified_features.public_places_config: Returns country_options from admin settings for web address flow
verified_features.public_places_postal_lookup: Validates postal_code, country params; returns fallback when no key
verified_features.public_places_details: Validates place_id param; returns fallback when no key
verified_features.admin_ui_google_maps_card: Shows key status badge, masked key, country checkboxes (DE/AT/CH/FR), save button
verified_features.listing_details_address_block: Correctly disabled when no category selected, shows warning message
